name: Academic Setup
desc: Enter/manage departments, terms, sessions, arms and academic periods used across the platform.

name: Students & Profiles
desc: Central student information system with guardian info and Drive-linked photos.

name: Staff / Teachers
desc: Full staff records: teaching/non-teaching, subject taught, qualification, religion, marital status, photo (Drive link) and auto staff number. Approved teacher sign-ups are auto-added here.

name: Classes
desc: Create each class/arm and assign a class teacher by choosing from a staff dropdown — no typing. Set level and capacity.

name: Subjects
desc: Register every subject once, give it a code/department/level, and map it to a teacher (chosen from staff). Used everywhere subjects are picked.

name: Attendance
desc: Daily/class attendance. Pull a whole class PRESENT automatically from QR check-ins — no one-by-one typing. Parent alerts.

name: Punctuality Points
desc: Rewards students who check in before the deadline AND check out during closing — daily points, term leaderboard, one-click push into any Results report-card column. Builds punctuality culture.

name: Results / Scores
desc: Enter CA + exam scores per student/subject/term/session (all chosen from dropdowns). Grades auto-suggested. Feeds report cards & promotion.

name: Timetable
desc: Class & exam timetables with auto-conflict detection.

name: Scheme of Work
desc: Termly planning + weekly progress tracking with proprietor dashboard.

name: CBT / Online Exams
desc: Full embedded CBT engine: 17 question types, CSV upload, timer, randomisation, negative marking, anti-cheat, certificates, link/code access — results auto-flow into report cards.

name: AI Question Prompts
desc: Ready-made Simple/Intermediate/Advanced prompts you paste into any free AI chat to draft CBT questions in the exact CSV format — copy, edit, upload. The platform itself uses no paid AI.

name: Entrance & Assessments
desc: Run entrance/common-entrance/placement exams that anonymous candidates can sit. Instant result slips, certificates and admission letters — single or bulk.

name: Storage Manager
desc: See how much Supabase space each table uses and safely purge old, low-value rows (after exporting) to make room — keeps you on the free tier.

name: Report Cards (flexible)
desc: Define custom assessment columns per subject (CA1, CA2, Assignment, Project, Exam) with apportioned max marks. CBT/online results auto-map into the right column. Totals, grades & positions computed.

name: Analytics Dashboard
desc: Live, platform-wide KPIs & charts across every module to support informed decisions.

name: Approvals
desc: Approve/reject prospective students, parents and staff (and admissions applications) right from the admin dashboard. Set roles, approve, suspend or delete.

name: Admin Data Console
desc: Admin-only: read, delete, full backup (JSON) and restore of every table on the client site. All actions logged.

name: Timetable Generator
desc: Auto-builds a conflict-free timetable (no class/teacher double-booking) from each subject weekly period demand — deterministic, no AI.

name: QR Check-in
desc: Students self-check-in by scanning their ID-card QR (or typing admission no). No biometric hardware needed.

name: Student Diary
desc: Daily homework/classwork/behaviour log; parents view & acknowledge.

name: Surveys & Forms
desc: Anonymous-optional feedback forms & surveys with response collection.

name: Menu / Meal Planner
desc: Weekly meal planner with allergen notes for parents.

name: Settings (2FA · Language · A11y)
desc: Free email-OTP 2FA, multi-language UI (incl. Hausa/Yoruba/Igbo), and accessibility (font scaling, high contrast).

name: Assignments / Homework
desc: Post & track assignments with submission and grading.

name: Library
desc: Book catalogue, lending records, barcode scanning, due-date alerts.

name: Digital Library
desc: Teachers assign online books/links + optional comprehension questions; auto-scored marks count toward grades.

name: Conduct / Behaviour
desc: Merit/demerit, incidents, pattern tracking.

name: Health / Clinic
desc: Sick-bay visits, medical history, allergy alerts.

name: Promotion / Graduation
desc: Automated promotion: from each student's term average vs a benchmark you set, the system drafts promote/repeat/graduate decisions. Admin reviews/edits, then applies. Graduates move to Alumni.

name: Fees & Payments
desc: Fee structures, balances, print-ready receipts, payment tracking.

name: School Finance
desc: Income/expense ledger with charts and KPI analytics.

name: Leave Management
desc: Staff leave requests with approval workflows and calendar.

name: Visitor Management
desc: Gate-pass, check-in/out, host notifications, badges.

name: Transport / Bus
desc: Routes, GPS tracking, pick-up records.

name: Announcements
desc: School-wide notices with priority levels and pinning.

name: Events & Calendar
desc: Term calendar with RSVP, venue booking.

name: Messaging (WA/Email)
desc: Free bulk WhatsApp + email + SMS to parents/staff.

name: In-App Inbox
desc: Private staff↔admin↔parent threaded messaging.

name: Complaints & Grievance
desc: Submit→route→track→resolve with evidence and status.

name: Results Broadcast
desc: One-click send results to parents via free channels.

name: Voting & Polls
desc: Class prefects, head boy/girl, staff polls, anonymous ballots.

name: Photo & Video Gallery
desc: Albums, Google Drive image linking, YouTube embeds.

name: E-Resources / Notes
desc: Lesson notes, past questions, Drive-linked documents.

name: Birthdays
desc: Celebrate with auto-reminders and wish lists.

name: Digital ID Cards
desc: Generate & print branded student/staff cards with a scannable QR code (encodes the ID for attendance). Pick a student or enter manually.

name: Marketing Flyer
desc: Generate a printable, branded promotional flyer/poster for admissions and parent outreach — free lead-gen.

name: Reports & Export
desc: CSV / PDF / Excel exports + analytics dashboard.

name: Directory
desc: Searchable people directory with role filters.

name: Departments & Offices
desc: Per-department coordination, resource management.

name: Parent–Child Mapping
desc: Link parents to children for results, fees, complaints.

name: Admissions & Enrollment
desc: Public application form → review funnel → enrollment.

name: Salary & Payslips
desc: Run staff salaries: basic, allowances, bonus, overtime, tax, pension & loan deductions with AUTO net-pay and printable professional payslips.

name: Payroll Register
desc: The full salary register — pick staff from a list, auto-compute net pay, approve/pay status, and print a payslip for every month.

name: Staff Loans & Advances
desc: Track staff loans/salary advances with monthly EMI repayment schedules, amount repaid and status (active/completed/defaulted).

name: Staff Bonuses
desc: Record performance, 13th-month, holiday and long-service bonuses per staff with citations and pay status.

name: Staff Appraisals
desc: Structured performance appraisals with weighted 1–10 criteria (punctuality, teaching quality, results, teamwork, conduct), AUTO score & band, and a recommendation.

name: Grading Rubrics
desc: Standards-based rubrics (PowerSchool/Edsby parity): define skills/criteria and a scale so assessment aligns to learning objectives.

name: Academic Transcripts
desc: Cumulative academic records / transcripts per student across sessions — international standard for transfers and applications.

name: Transfer Certificates
desc: Issue transfer/leaving certificates (National Records Exchange parity) with conduct and reason for leaving.

name: Counselling & Wellbeing
desc: Confidential student counselling/wellbeing session log with status tracking and referrals.

name: Hostel / Boarding
desc: Block/room/bed tracking with active/vacated status.

name: Alumni Network
desc: Graduation-year directory, mentorship, fundraising.

name: Inventory & Assets
desc: Equipment/supplies register with location and condition.

name: Certificates & Documents
desc: Issue branded, printable certificates (achievement, graduation, testimonial) with a unique verification code.

name: School Calendar
desc: Academic calendar with holidays, mid-terms and term dates.

name: Lost & Found
desc: Log lost & found items, claim with photo evidence.

name: PTA Meeting Scheduler
desc: Schedule parent-teacher meetings, send reminders, log minutes.

name: Book Reservation
desc: Students reserve library books; auto-queue when returned.

name: Affective Domain
desc: Record punctuality, neatness, politeness, honesty, leadership, cooperation and attentiveness ratings for each learner. These flow into report cards.

name: Psychomotor Domain
desc: Record handwriting, verbal fluency, sports, crafts, drawing and music ratings for each learner. These flow into report cards.

name: Report Card Comments
desc: Enter class-teacher comments, principal comments and next-term begins dates for each learner report card.

name: HMG Ecosystem
desc: Lead-generation page for the HMG Concepts ecosystem and client-school visibility. Distinct from the HMG Digital Products catalogue.

name: School Fee Structure
desc: Set current and next-term fee structures by class and arm. Each student dashboard and report card receives the matching bill and prior balance.

name: School Products
desc: Manage school uniform, books, stationery and required products with price, category and stock notes for family dashboards.

name: Role & Status Manager
desc: Authorized administrators search people and change role/status with an audit trail. Use for approved, suspended, active and cross-role changes.

name: HMG Digital Products
desc: HMG Concepts Ecosystem product catalogue with official flyers and contact paths. Visible in every portal navigation.

name: Integrated LMS
desc: Unified learning platform for course tracking, video lessons, and online assignment submissions.

name: Rewards & Badges (PBIS)
desc: Give students points for good behaviour/effort and award badges. A simple, transparent positive-reinforcement tracker — every point is logged and visible.

name: Cafeteria & Meals
desc: Student meal plans, dietary restrictions tracking, and pre-paid wallets.

name: Scholarships & Aid
desc: Manage fee waivers, sponsor tracking, and scholarship renewals.

name: Front Desk / Dispatch
desc: Track postal dispatch, calls, and walk-in admission inquiries.

name: Career & Placement
desc: Track college applications, university offers, and career guidance.

name: Custom Document Builder
desc: Drag-and-drop builder for hall tickets, bonafide letters, and custom IDs.

name: Advanced Fleet GPS
desc: Bus route optimization, live tracking placeholder, driver logs.

name: Facility Booking
desc: Schedule science labs, sports fields, and auditorium usage.

name: Compliance & Audit
desc: Track accreditation metrics, fire drills, and statutory inspections.

name: Audit / Activity Log
desc: Tamper-evident log of every create/update/delete/login — who did what, when (PowerSchool/Infinite Campus parity).

name: Academic Records & Broadsheets
desc: Generate student record cards, class broadsheets and subject broadsheets for print/PDF.

name: About the Developer
desc: The developer & HMG Concepts brand bio — the last page of the site.

name: Lesson Plans & Curriculum
desc: Teachers author weekly lesson plans with objectives & resources; HODs approve (Chalk parity).

name: Behaviour & PBIS Points
desc: Award merit points and badges for positive behaviour; live leaderboards (ClassDojo parity).

name: Special Education / Support
desc: Track learning needs, interventions, goals and review dates per student (Provision Map parity).

name: Fundraising & Donations
desc: Run campaigns, log donor pledges & gifts, generate thank-you receipts (Blackbaud/FreshSchools parity).

name: Substitute / Cover
desc: Assign cover teachers when staff are absent; daily cover sheet & history.

name: IT / Help Desk
desc: Internal ticketing for IT, maintenance and admin requests with priority & status.

name: Online Fee Payments
desc: Generate Paystack/Flutterwave checkout links or bank-transfer instructions — free integrations, no monthly fee.
